title: Singer and actor Miwa Akihiro dies at 91
summary: Known for his song 'Yoitomake no Uta' and his pacifist activism, his death moves Japan.

title: United States and Iran intensify mutual attacks in the Middle East
summary: Both sides accuse each other of violating the ceasefire as bombings against military installations continue.

title: Fire at a factory in Osaka burns 1,000 square meters and affects homes
summary: The incident in Higashiyodogawa left one person slightly injured and required the mobilization of 46 fire trucks to extinguish it.

title: General news about the 2026 FIFA World Cup
summary: Reports on counterfeit jerseys, tournament stars, the qualifying draw, and coaches' statements.

title: Earthquake in Venezuela leaves at least 1,430 dead and severe economic damage
summary: The earthquake, with hundreds of aftershocks, devastated the capital and its surroundings, with losses estimated at over one trillion yen.

title: Magnitude 6.1 earthquake shakes Iwate and Aomori prefectures with intensity 5
summary: The earthquake off the coast of Iwate did not generate a tsunami, but authorities warn of possible aftershocks.

title: Japan and South Korea defense ministers agree to strengthen cooperation
summary: In a historic meeting, both countries reaffirmed denuclearization and agreed to joint search and rescue exercises.

title: South Korea eliminated from World Cup and president criticizes coach
summary: The defeat against the Democratic Republic of the Congo sealed South Korea's elimination, prompting an unusual presidential reprimand.

title: Shohei Ohtani and Yoshinobu Yamamoto shine in Major League Baseball
summary: Ohtani gets two hits while Yamamoto earns his eighth win; both are candidates for the Cy Young Award.

title: England and Colombia advance to World Cup round of 16
summary: England defeated Panama 2-0 with goals from Bellingham and Kane, while Colombia secured first place in Group K.

title: LDP lawmaker says Princess Aiko cannot inherit the throne
summary: Veteran politician Nakasone stated that a woman is not fit to reign and that 'there is no one to marry her'.

title: Fire in a house in Akita causes death of two elderly people
summary: The fire destroyed a house in Katagami and the bodies of the residents were found among the rubble.

title: Messi sets record by scoring in seven consecutive World Cup matches
summary: The Argentine scored as a substitute and reached 19 goals in World Cups, surpassing the previous record.

title: Japan prepares for match against Brazil in World Cup
summary: Japanese players and fans show great anticipation for the match against the five-time world champions.

title: Woman evacuated due to typhoon experiences intensity 5 earthquake while sleeping
summary: A 78-year-old woman taking refuge in a community center experienced moments of panic upon feeling a strong earthquake.

title: Part of Hikone Castle wall collapses due to typhoon rains
summary: The section of the inner moat wall collapsed due to heavy rains caused by typhoons 7 and 8.

title: Mayor of Konosu reelected without voting for first time in 12 years
summary: Masatoshi Namiki secured a new term without needing an election as no other candidates came forward.

title: Meiji University wins national university judo championship after 25 years
summary: Meiji University's men's judo team was crowned champion of the national tournament for the first time in a quarter century.

title: Ukraine attacks Russian military installations with long-range missiles
summary: Ukrainian forces launched an attack with domestically-made missiles against the war industry in southern Russia.

title: Search continues for 5-year-old boy missing at a hot spring
summary: The boy's mother makes a desperate appeal while authorities expand the search area.
